prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime fantasy illustration of a mysterious young male celestial sorcerer seated at an ornate cosmic chart table, wearing flowing layered midnight blue and black kimono-style robes embroidered with prominent gold filigree, dangling blue-gold earrings, necklaces, and subtle star-like jewelry. His messy dark hair is backlit and wind-tossed, and his face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque muted gray square censor block. The scene is set under a vast starry night sky with turquoise aurora curtains, purple nebula clouds, distant mountains, and a large circular golden astrolabe or celestial gate framing the background. On the table, draw exactly 8 glowing miniature Earth-like glass spheres: one medium sphere at the far left edge, one tiny purple-blue sphere just to its right, one large sphere in the left mid-foreground, one very large sphere at the bottom-left foreground, one small sphere near the center rear, one large sphere at the bottom center foreground, one large sphere on the right foreground, and one small sphere at the far right rear; additionally, the sorcerer delicately holds exactly 1 floating Earth sphere between the fingers of his right hand, for a total of 9 Earth spheres. His left hand holds a slender pointer wand touching a bright golden star point at the center of the engraved map table. The tabletop is glossy and reflective, covered in intricate gold astronomical circles, constellation lines, orbit diagrams, runes, and blue luminous grid patterns. Use dramatic cinematic lighting, deep navy shadows, electric cyan highlights, crisp gold accents, sparkling stars, magical particles, high contrast, ultra-refined linework, painterly anime rendering, immersive depth, and a polished fantasy key-visual composition. Aspect ratio 3:4.
